reviews.review_description: The turning physics need a massive oberhaul alomg with the board physics

reviews.review_title: s tier game to try out
reviews.review_description: This game truly is amazing, from the physics, to the grinding, to the upgrades. throughout the game, I struggled to learn the controls, but the more you play, the better you get. my only flaw about this game is that there aren't any more missions. hopefully that will be added in the future
The game is good and fun but makes me very nauseas I can’t play for more than five seconds it’s just a comfort issue other than that it’s a good game

I couldn't figure out how to keep grinding. What I mean is there was a needle in front of you and it would lean from left to right or vice versa and you had to keep it in the middle to balance. I couldn't figure out how to keep the needle in the middle if you can help plz let me know. Other than that fun game would totally recommend
